samples.raw: We need to output JSON on a single line, with fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Must be valid JSON. Must be Romanian, correct diacritics, no words from other languages. Must follow con

We need to output JSON on one line: {"titlu":"...","fapt":"..."} where "titlu" is the translated title, and "fapt" is a sentence with the main fact. Must be natural Romanian, correct terms: oil=țes, b

We need to output JSON on one line with fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Must be valid JSON on one line. Title must be clear Romanian reformulated. Fact: 1-2 neutral sentences with ma

{"titlu":"Riscul de vânzare a acțiunilor tech din cauza poziționării, conform lui Chew de la Citi", "fapt":"Chew de la Citi avertizează că există un risc de vânzare a acțiunilor tech din cauza pozițio
We need to output JSON valid on one line, with fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Must be Romanian, correct diacritics, no words from other languages. Must not translate word for word.
